relations.note: The D/M tint detail refines the base campaign headline colorway rule.
Lockup copy accompanies the headline treatment in the same campaign hero.

quotes: Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue**
Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Preserve the locked campaign headline treatment.
rules.rule_text: The "YOU DESERVE MORE" campaign headline is set in Agenda (font.headline.print = Agenda; digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only, with email fallback Nunito Sans ExtraBold, weight.nunito_sans.extrabold = ExtraBold) and rendered ALL CAPS, always (campaign_headline.case = all_caps). It uses one of two approved colorways: brand Gold/Sunshine (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) or Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b). In hero placements it stacks as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE), left-aligned (campaign_headline.alignment = left).

quotes: are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
tinted letters at 40% of the same hue

rules.intent: Encode the intentional 40%-tint D/M motif in the campaign headline.
rules.rule_text: Within the campaign headline, the letters "D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint of the headline color (opacity.headline.letter_tint_40 = 0.4), tinted at 40% of the same hue as the chosen colorway — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: **YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Preserve the approved verbatim lockup claim wording.
rules.rule_text: The full campaign lockup copy must appear verbatim: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."
